texto: The chaos and the confusion of all possible outcomes penetrated every pixel of computer generated light, and the waves of all sub-existential normality flooded by, creating an atmosphere of peaceful eventuality. I felt that a gradual restoration was in place, and that piece by piece, universes were being reformed and restored.
explicacao: Citação de Joel Julian sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “The chaos and the confusion of all possible outcomes penetrated every pixel of computer generated…” articula reflexao, science-fiction, piece em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
